description: A plain nighttime evidence/candid photograph with no design overlay or on-image text. It depicts the side of a white extended-cab utility/service truck (a pickup with a boxed utility bed full of compartment doors and a diamond-plate top rail) photographed in the dark, illuminated by flashlight and what appears to be red emergency lighting at the right edge. Bare tree branches and a white bucket are visible in the truck bed. Per the tweet, the truck contained hidden compartments where eight illegal aliens were found locked during an ICE San Antonio human-smuggling interdiction in Dimmit County, Texas. The image is a documentary law-enforcement photo of the vehicle, with no agency seal, slogan, or graphic styling.
